evaluators.name: Cheapest Medium Bamboo Cutting Board with Engraving Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added exactly one medium bamboo cutting board under $60 with engraving to the cart, and that it is the cheapest qualifying option.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Stainless 20oz Tumblers with Fastest-Cheap Shipping Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added 4 stainless 20 oz tumblers under $35 with rating ≥4, chose the cheapest qualifying tumbler, and selected the cheapest shipping option that delivers within 10 business days.

evaluators.name: Higher-Rated Walnut vs Maple Phone Stand Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for phone stands under $40, compared at least one walnut and one maple engraved phone stand, and added the higher-rated of the two to the cart with engraving.

evaluators.name: Bulk Quote for 50 Aluminum Keychains Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted a bulk quote request for 50 aluminum keychains with a $300 budget, a ~30-day timeline, and engraved keychain details.

evaluators.name: Rustic Wedding Welcome Sign to Wishlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved a rustic 12 x 18 in wedding welcome sign with dark walnut finish, names and date to the wishlist, and did not add it to the cart.

evaluators.name: Anniversary Gift with Free Gift Wrap Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added an anniversary gift under $40 with rating ≥4 and free gift wrap, personalized with a message and one unit in the cart, and did not also keep a wrong anniversary gift without free wrap.

evaluators.name: Three Engraved Pens for Same-Day Store Pickup Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user selected a same-day pickup store near ZIP 94103 and added 3 qualifying engraved pens under $25 with 4+ stars for same-day store pickup, each with a different engraved name and black ink.

evaluators.name: Custom Wall Art Video Consultation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted a video-call consultation request for wall art & large signs with a 36 x 24 in, ~$400 budget description and valid contact details at a future time.
